title: 1 Maccabees
text: 1 Maccabees - Literal Public Domain Translation (older base)

title: 1 Maccabees
text: After that Alexander the Macedonian, the son of Philip, who came out of the land of Chettiim, had smitten Darius the king of the Persians and Medes, he reigned in his stead, the first over Greece...
